instruction: Organize the Q1 highlights into the report document

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Q1 Performance Highlights
1. Total Revenue: 35.2M CNY, 23.5% YoY growth
2. New Contracts: 18, total contract value 12.8M CNY
3. New Clients: 45, total client count reaches 312
4. Net Profit Margin: 18.2%, up 2.3 percentage points YoY
5. Employee Satisfaction: 88 (internal survey)' > /home/user/Desktop/q1_highlights.txt

phases.instruction: Organize the Q1 highlights into the report document
Extract the total revenue data from /home/user/Desktop/q1_highlights.txt, append to /home/user/Desktop/q1_report.txt: 'Q1 Total Revenue: 35.2M CNY, 23.5% YoY growth', save
